title: Spicy Garlicky Kimchi Fried Rice
description: A flavorful Korean-inspired dish made with kimchi, mitbanchan, and garlicky goodness. Perfect for a quick and spicy meal.

ingredients.name: Gochujang (Korean chili paste)
ingredients.notes: adjust level of spiciness to taste

instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the kimchi and mitbanchan. Cook for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the gochujang and soy sauce. Stir to combine and cook for an additional minute.
Add the garlicky rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the kimchi mixture.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the rice is heated through and starting to brown.
Transfer the rice mixture to a serving platter and garnish with chopped green onions.
